svg.title: Workout contribution graph
svg.desc: GitHub-style contribution calendar. Green cells are activity in other repositories, purple cells highlight Sportacus.

text.font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, Segoe UI, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif
